best_review_details.text:
I recently purchased an older property that needed a fair bit of electrical work — including installing additional sockets, updating light fittings, and adding a car charger. From start to finish, Naz and Henry were absolutely fantastic. I would 100% recommend them to anyone looking for reliable, high-quality electrical work.

Communication with Naz via WhatsApp was seamless; he always responded p
best_review_details.author: Molly

best_review_details.text:
I recently hired Naz from Amrock to run power to an outbuilding on my property, and I couldn’t be happier with the results. From start to finish, the experience was smooth and professional. He showed up on time, explained everything clearly, and made sure the job was done safely and up to regulations.

The quality of the work was excellent—clean, efficient, and exactly what I needed.

Highly recom
best_review_details.author: Faye

best_review_details.text: Naz & Co. from Amrock installed my new electrical fire and connected it to a Fused spur through the wall.   Excellent work carried out and their rates were VERY affordable.    They even setup the fuel effect.  5* service at great prices, Highly recommend.
best_review_details.author: Simon
